display.purpose: Hero h1 only. The biggest editorial statement on the page; the italic em inside is the One Italic Anchor.

headline.purpose: Major narrative transitions. Always paired with eyebrow + gold-rule below.

title.purpose: Service card names, journal article cards. Serif voice at small scale.

body.purpose: Default reading text. Line-height 1.7-1.8. Demographic skews 35-55.

label.purpose: Eyebrows, trust pills, badges. Sans voice at its quietest.

shadows.name: carousel-handle
shadows.purpose: Only sanctioned drop-shadow. Applied to the before/after carousel draggable handle pill. Nowhere else.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default easing for opacity, transform, and color transitions.

motion.name: ease-out-quart
motion.purpose: Hero CTA hover translateY lifts. Exponential ease-out — never elastic, never bounce.

motion.name: duration-hover
motion.purpose: Quick state transitions (button bg, border, color).

motion.name: duration-stripe
motion.purpose: Bottom-stripe scaleX hover affordance on service cards.

motion.name: duration-crossfade
motion.purpose: Hero video stack crossfade between clips. Respects prefers-reduced-motion.

breakpoints.name: mobile
breakpoints.purpose: Body-text floor enforced at 16px (1rem). Mobile menu activates.

breakpoints.name: tablet
breakpoints.purpose: Hamburger nav from 860px down (avoids 922→672 overflow at 641-859px).

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Atlas Gold CTA pill. Sharp-cornered, uppercase Jost label. Used for hero primary CTA and Book Now actions.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-family: 'Jost', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.62rem; font-weight: 400; letter-spacing: 0.22em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #06100a; background: #c9a84c; padding: 0.95rem 2rem; min-height: 48px; text-decoration: none; border: none; border-radius: 0; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.25s, transform 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #e8cc88; transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #e8cc88; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Transparent secondary action. Atlas Gold border at 0.35 alpha. Used across all pages for secondary CTAs (Read Full Technique, Browse Journal).
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-block; font-family: 'Jost', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.6rem; font-weight: 400; letter-spacing: 0.22em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #c9a84c; background: transparent; border: 1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.35); padding: 14px 32px; text-decoration: none; border-radius: 0; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.25s, border-color 0.25s; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: rgba(201,168,76,0.08); border-color: #c9a84c; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #e8cc88; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Service Card
components.description: Sharp-cornered Atlas Pitch card with bottom-stripe scaleX hover affordance. Service badge eyebrow, Cormorant title, italic Jost hook, meta row with gold-rule above duration+price.
components.html:
Signature Service

Restorative Buccal Facial

Intraoral fascia work, lymphatic drainage, and the slow craft of midface release.

110 min250
→
components.css: .ds-service-card { display: flex; flex-direction: column; background: #06100a; color: #f4f0e6; padding: 2.2rem 2rem 2rem; text-decoration: none; border: none; border-radius: 0; position: relative; overflow: hidden; transition: background 0.3s; cursor: pointer; min-height: 280px; } .ds-service-card::after { content: ''; position: absolute; bottom: 0; left: 0; right: 0; height: 2px; background: #c9a84c; transform: scaleX(0); transform-origin: left; transition: transform 0.35s ease; } .ds-service-card:hover { background: #0a1810; } .ds-service-card:hover::after { transform: scaleX(1); } .ds-service-badge { font-family: 'Jost', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.48rem; font-weight: 400; letter-spacing: 0.22em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #c9a84c; border: 1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.3); padding: 3px 8px; border-radius: 2px; display: inline-block; margin-bottom: 1rem; width: fit-content; } .ds-service-name { font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', Georgia, serif; font-size: 1.4rem; font-weight: 300; color: #f4f0e6; line-height: 1.2; margin: 0 0 0.6rem; } .ds-service-hook { font-family: 'Jost', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.78rem; font-style: italic; color: rgba(244,240,230,0.65); line-height: 1.6; margin: 0 0 1.4rem; flex: 1; } .ds-service-meta { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; padding-top: 1.1rem; border-top: 1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.1); } .ds-service-duration { font-family: 'Jost', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.55rem; letter-spacing: 0.15em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #8aaa8a; } .ds-service-price { font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', Georgia, serif; font-size: 1.1rem; color: #e8cc88; } .ds-service-arrow { position: absolute; top: 2.2rem; right: 2rem; font-size: 0.75rem; color: rgba(201,168,76,0.3); transition: color 0.3s, transform 0.3s; } .ds-service-card:hover .ds-service-arrow { color: #c9a84c; transform: translateX(3px); }

components.name: Trust Pill
components.description: Sage Mist trust badge with Atlas Gold checkmark. Used in hero trust-bar.
components.css: .ds-trust-pill { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; font-family: 'Jost', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.58rem; font-weight: 400; letter-spacing: 0.2em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #8aaa8a; border: 1px solid rgba(138,170,138,0.25); padding: 0.45rem 1rem; background: rgba(22,43,28,0.45); border-radius: 0; } .ds-trust-check { color: #c9a84c; font-size: 0.7rem; }

components.name: Eyebrow + Section Heading + Gold Rule
components.description: The canonical section opener: Sage Mist eyebrow, 40x1 gold-rule, Cormorant section heading with Italic Gold em. The One Italic Anchor applies.
components.html:
FIG. 1 · The Studio Method

A different category of facial work
components.css: .ds-section-opener { text-align: center; } .ds-eyebrow { display: block; font-family: 'Jost', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.6rem; font-weight: 400; letter-spacing: 0.25em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #8aaa8a; margin-bottom: 0.75rem; } .ds-gold-rule { width: 40px; height: 1px; background: #c9a84c; opacity: 0.5; margin: 1.25rem auto; } .ds-section-heading { font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', Georgia, serif; font-weight: 300; font-size: clamp(1.9rem, 3vw, 2.6rem); line-height: 1.1; color: #f4f0e6; margin: 0; } .ds-section-heading em { font-style: italic; color: #e8cc88; }

components.name: Studio Menu Row (Apothecary precision)
components.description: The apothecary half of the hybrid metaphor. Numbered formulation rows with hairline divider, service name, duration, price. For booking pages and service menus.
components.html:
• No. 1Restorative Buccal Facial110 min250
  • No. 2Soothe Lymphatic Drainage60 min175
  • No. 3Facial Architecture Ritual75 min195
components.css: .ds-studio-menu { list-style: none; margin: 0; padding: 0; background: #06100a; border-top: 1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.15); border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.15); } .ds-menu-row { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 56px 1fr auto auto; gap: 1.5rem; align-items: baseline; padding: 1.1rem 0; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.08); } .ds-menu-row:last-child { border-bottom: none; } .ds-menu-no { font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', Georgia, serif; font-size: 1rem; font-style: italic; color: #e8cc88; letter-spacing: 0.04em; } .ds-menu-name { font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', Georgia, serif; font-size: 1.05rem; font-weight: 300; color: #f4f0e6; } .ds-menu-dur { font-family: 'Jost', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.6rem; letter-spacing: 0.18em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #8aaa8a; } .ds-menu-price { font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', Georgia, serif; font-size: 1.1rem; color: #c9a84c; min-width: 3ch; text-align: right; }

components.name: Navigation
components.description: Fixed top nav with brand mark, link list, primary CTA. Mobile hamburger from 860px down.
components.html:
Altru RadianceAesthetic Wellness · Murray UT
  • Services
  • Journal
  • About

components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; padding: 0 3rem; height: 68px; background: rgba(6,16,10,0.97); border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.12); } .ds-nav-brand { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0.08rem; text-decoration: none; } .ds-nav-brand-name { font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', Georgia, serif; font-size: 1.05rem; letter-spacing: 0.28em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #c9a84c; line-height: 1; } .ds-nav-brand-sub { font-size: 0.46rem; letter-spacing: 0.3em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #8aaa8a; line-height: 1; } .ds-nav-links { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 2rem; list-style: none; margin: 0; padding: 0; } .ds-nav-links a { font-family: 'Jost', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.6rem; letter-spacing: 0.2em; text-transform: uppercase; color: rgba(244,240,230,0.65); text-decoration: none; transition: color 0.25s; } .ds-nav-links a:hover { color: #c9a84c; } .ds-nav-cta { font-family: 'Jost', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.62rem; letter-spacing: 0.2em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #06100a; background: #c9a84c; padding: 0.55rem 1.4rem; text-decoration: none; transition: background 0.3s; border-radius: 0; } .ds-nav-cta:hover { background: #e8cc88; }

narrative.northStar: The Anatomical Atlas, with Apothecary precision in the studio menu.
narrative.overview: The brand reads like a serious illustrated anatomy reference — Vesalius's De humani corporis fabrica or a Renaissance medical study, modernized but never reframed as wellness. Italic captions name the muscle. Hairline rules separate illustration from annotation. Gold-foil chapter markers (FIG. 1, FIG. 2) sit on deep-forest parchment. The studio teaches what it does, page by page, with the calm authority of a textbook that doesn't have to sell itself. Where the brand transitions from teaching to transacting — service menus, pricing tables, booking pages — it shifts to apothecary-grade restraint. Numbered formulations (No. 1, No. 2), label-typography precision, the studio as small-batch maker. Atlas authority dominant; apothecary precision in the cataloging. This system explicitly rejects the standard med-spa template, the wellness-mystic lane, and the corporate-clinical dermatologist sterility. The Atlas is dark-toned, parchment-coded, mechanically grounded — never floaty, never clinical-cold.
keyCharacteristics: Deep forest-tinged blacks as substrate, never #000
Two-tone gold accent (Atlas Gold for primary, Italic Gold for emphasis)
Cormorant Garamond italic ledes as emotional anchor — one per page
Hairline rules (1.5px gaps, 1px borders at 0.08-0.15 alpha) as structural language
Sharp edges by default; radius reserved for pill-shaped tap targets
Bottom-stripe hover (gold scaleX 0→1) as the only card-affordance pattern
Layered tonal depth — atlas-pitch, atlas-substrate, atlas-forest are explicit elevation steps
Generous editorial line-height (1.7-1.8) on body copy; cap line length at 65-75ch

rules.name: The One Italic Anchor Rule
rules.body: Each page has exactly ONE italic phrase as its emotional anchor. Italic Cormorant Garamond + Italic Gold is the only accent treatment for headings. No underline, no background color, no scale change on the accent. The italic carries hierarchy alone.

rules.name: The Atlas Gold Rarity Rule
rules.body: Atlas Gold is used on ≤10% of any given screen. Its rarity is the point. If gold is everywhere, it's nowhere.

rules.name: The Italic Accent Rule
rules.body: Italic Cormorant Garamond + Italic Gold is the ONLY treatment for emphasis inside a heading. Never underline a heading. Never apply background color to emphasized text. Never bold. The italic is the entire grammar of emphasis.

rules.name: The Generous Line-Height Rule
rules.body: Body line-height never drops below 1.6. Demographic skews 35-55; eye fatigue is real. Pillar text, philosophy paragraphs, and Journal articles use 1.7-1.8.

rules.name: The No-Shadow Rule
rules.body: Cards do not have box-shadows at rest. Drop-shadows are reserved for the carousel handle and the live-update fade animation only. Hover lifts use translateY micro-movements (≤2px) plus the bottom-stripe affordance, never a shadow swap-in.

rules.name: The Paper-Layer Rule
rules.body: When introducing a new section, choose its substrate (atlas-pitch, atlas-substrate, atlas-forest) deliberately — adjacent sections must contrast tonally. Two adjacent sections on the same substrate read as one undifferentiated wall.

rules.name: The 1.5px Gridline Rule
rules.body: Multi-column grids (services, journal, results) use a 1.5px gap with a darker tint on the grid container as background. The gap reveals the tint, creating a hairline rule between cells without using cell borders. Never apply border to grid items — the gap IS the rule.

rules.name: The Bottom-Stripe Rule
rules.body: Hoverable cards get an animated 2px gold bottom-stripe via ::after with transform scaleX(0) → scaleX(1) and transform-origin left. Never a glow, never a border-color shift, never a lift greater than 2px. The stripe is the entire hover affordance.

rules.name: The No-Radius Rule
rules.body: Border-radius is reserved for pill-shaped tap targets only — carousel dots, the draggable carousel handle, the round logo placeholder, and one 2px hairline radius on small label-pills. Everything else is sharp-cornered. Radius is a feature, not a default.

dos: Do lead every hero with one italic Cormorant Garamond phrase in Italic Gold (#e8cc88). One per page, always inside the h1 em. The italic carries the emotional anchor.
Do anchor color decisions to the seven named tokens. No off-token greys, no off-token golds, no bright accents.
Do use tonal layering (atlas-pitch → atlas-substrate → atlas-forest) for section depth. Adjacent sections must contrast tonally.
Do apply the 1.5px gap pattern to all multi-column primary grids. The gap with tinted background creates the hairline rule.
Do use the bottom-stripe pattern as the sole card-hover affordance. transform scaleX(0→1) over 0.35s with transform-origin left.
Do cap body line length at 65-75ch and never drop body line-height below 1.6.
Do name muscles, tissues, and mechanisms specifically. Buccinator, masseter, SMAS, mechanotransduction, lymphatic flow. Anatomy is the proof.
Do number the studio menu apothecary-style (No. 1, No. 2) in pricing/booking surfaces. Atlas authority in editorial; apothecary precision in catalog.
Do keep Atlas Gold at ≤10% of any given screen. Its rarity is the point.
donts: Don't use #000 or #fff anywhere. Every neutral is tinted toward the forest-gold hue family.
Don't use side-stripe border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a colored accent.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text + gradient). Single-color text. Emphasis via italic + Italic Gold, not gradients.
Don't introduce glassmorphism on cards or surfaces. The mobile menu's single backdrop-filter is the only sanctioned use.
Don't apply border-radius to cards, buttons, inputs, or sections. Radius is reserved for pill-shaped tap targets.
Don't drop shadows on cards at rest. The system uses tonal layering, not box-shadows.
Don't stack two italic accents in the same heading hierarchy. One italic em per page is the anchor.
Don't use generic wellness vocabulary — no 'glow from within,' 'self-love ritual,' 'holistic healing journey,' 'transformative,' 'radiant.'
Don't style the brand as a med-spa. No stock-photo smiling women, no before/after slider as the hero, no baby-pink or chrome accents, no 'Specials This Month' banners.
Don't style the brand as wellness-mystic. No crystals, soft-focus, sage-and-hand-lettered fonts.
Don't style the brand as corporate-clinical dermatologist. No stark white plus navy, no lab-coat photography, no sterile geometry.
Don't style the brand as templated Squarespace day-spa. No centered-everything beige minimalism, no lavender fields, no 'Mind Body Soul' headers.
Don't format pricing as Groupon-style headlines. Pricing is supporting detail in apothecary-precision menu format.
Don't use exclamation points or em dashes. Use commas, colons, semicolons, periods, or parentheses. No emojis anywhere.
